stemHtml: During the flight, the crew becomes aware that a navigation instrument which has NOT been required on this flight but will be required on a future flight is indicating incorrectly. In addition to having the fault investigated by the engineers, Regulation (EU) No 376/2014 requires.

options.a: The crew member who noticed the fault to report the occurrence as a serious incident to the national Civil Aviation Safety Investigation Authority within 72 hours.
options.b: The Pilot in Command to report the occurrence as a serious incident to the national Civil Aviation Safety Investigation Authority within 7 days.
options.c: The Pilot in Command to report the occurrence to the Operator's safety reporting system within 72 hours.
options.d: Nothing more is required because the failure did NOT affect that flight.
